privacy.s: CFPB consumer complaints: 24766 on record (100 in past 12mo); 100% timely response rate.

wiki.extract: Chime Financial, Inc. is an American financial technology company based in San Francisco, California. It provides fee-free mobile banking services through partnerships with two national banks, Stride Bank and The Bancorp Bank. The company offers fee-free checking and savings accounts, debit cards, and other financial products through its mobile application.

cases.caseName: J.D. Power v. Chime Financial, Inc.
Kelli Oliver-Allen v. Chime Financial, Inc.
Swarovski Aktiengesellschaft v. The Partnerships and Unincorporated Associations Identified on Schedule A

topHazards.label: The wind chime toy can be pulled apart exposing sharp metal rods, posing puncture and laceration hazards to the baby.
A design flaw can cause the aluminum on the chimeneas to catch fire or melt under high temperatures, posing fire and burn hazards.

sampleRecalls.title: Tiny Love Recalls Wind Chime Toys Due to Puncture and Laceration Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves wind chime toys sold separately, with the Gymini Kick & Play Activity Gym and Tiny Smarts Gift Sets. The toy produces the sound of a wind chime. "Tiny Love" is printed on a tag on the toy. The following names and item numbers are included in this recall: Name Item Number Baby Wind Chime # 493 Baby…
hazards: The wind chime toy can be pulled apart exposing sharp metal rods, posing puncture and laceration hazards to the baby.
injuries: The firm has received five reports of babies pulling apart the wind chimes exposing the sharp metal rods, including a report of a minor injury to a 24-month-old baby who punctured his cheek with the …
units: About 600,000 in the United States and 200,000 in Canada

sampleRecalls.title: Plow & Hearth Recalls Aluminum Chimeneas Due to Fire and Burn Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: The chimeneas are outdoor fireplaces that are aluminum, have a removable spark guard, a wrought iron base, and a four-sided screen.
hazards: A design flaw can cause the aluminum on the chimeneas to catch fire or melt under high temperatures, posing fire and burn hazards.
injuries: Plow & Hearth has received two reports of the chimenea's aluminum exterior catching fire and burning. No injuries or property damage have been reported.
